title: Job Opening Teacher at S.Chand Group

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at S.Chand Group
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at S.Chand Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About S.Chand Group:
S.Chand Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with S.Chand Group!
